title: 💫 Phantom Mirror Entities
name: Phantom Mirror Entities
what_it_is: Beings that only exist when reflected—dependent on others for form, haunting mirrors, lenses, or minds.
how_to_use: she appears only in mirrors—never seen directly, her form a recursive echo
his face is yours, reversed—he exists only when you look
animation_behavior: Only visible in certain views, glitches in from behind, reflection morphs as viewer changes
